briefing: Markets are risk-on today with NASDAQ up 1.1% and S&P 500 up 0.7%, a moderate but genuine green day. With $677 in cash, 4 open slots, and SEDG scoring a perfect 100 with all multi-signal confirmation including a volume surge, deploying into it is the clear call. Existing positions in QQQ, EAT, OLED, WT, ROAD, and INOD are held — no exits warranted today.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A volume surge occurs when a stock's trading volume spikes significantly above its recent average — typically 1.5x or more. It matters because price moves accompanied by heavy volume signal that large institutional investors (funds, banks) are actively buying, not just retail traders. When a volume surge aligns with a MACD crossover and RSI in the bullish zone, it's one of the strongest technical buy signals available.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「成交量激增」是指某支股票的單日成交量顯著高於近期均量，通常以1.5倍為門檻。其重要性在於：若價格上漲同時伴隨大量成交，代表大型機構（如基金、銀行）正在積極買入，而非僅是散戶追高。當成交量激增同時配合MACD金叉及RSI處於強勢區間，便構成技術面上最具說服力的買入信號之一。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities extended their recent recovery today, with technology and growth stocks leading as investor risk appetite remained firm. The NASDAQ's 1.1% gain reflected continued confidence in AI infrastructure spending and a cooling in near-term rate-hike fears. Broad participation across sectors suggested this was not a narrow short-squeeze but genuine buying interest from institutional participants.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日延續近期反彈格局，科技與成長股引領大盤上揚，投資者風險偏好維持穩健。那斯達克指數上漲1.1%，反映市場對AI基礎設施支出前景持樂觀態度，同時對短期升息疑慮有所緩解。各板塊普遍上漲，顯示今日買盤並非單一軋空行情，而是機構資金的積極布局。

trades.reasoning: Top-ranked candidate with all five signals firing — RSI in bullish zone (56.3), MACD crossover with rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and a volume surge indicating institutional participation; deploys remaining cash on the highest-conviction setup available on a confirmed risk-on day.
